14	
15	const IrcGroupSchema = z
16	  .object({
17	    requireMention: z.boolean().optional(),
18	    tools: ToolPolicySchema,
19	    toolsBySender: z.record(z.string(), ToolPolicySchema).optional(),
20	    skills: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
21	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
22	    allowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
23	    systemPrompt: z.string().optional(),
24	  })
25	  .strict();
26	
27	const IrcNickServSchema = z
28	  .object({
29	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
30	    service: z.string().optional(),
31	    password: z.string().optional(),
32	    passwordFile: z.string().optional(),
33	    register: z.boolean().optional(),
34	    registerEmail: z.string().optional(),
35	  })
36	  .strict()
37	  .superRefine((value, ctx) => {
38	    if (value.register && !value.registerEmail?.trim()) {
39	      ctx.addIssue({
40	        code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
41	        path: ["registerEmail"],
42	        message: "channels.irc.nickserv.register=true requires channels.irc.nickserv.registerEmail",
43	      });
44	    }
45	  });
46	
47	export const IrcAccountSchemaBase = z
48	  .object({
49	    name: z.string().optional(),
50	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
51	    dangerouslyAllowNameMatching: z.boolean().optional(),
52	    host: z.string().optional(),
53	    port: z.number().int().min(1).max(65535).optional(),
54	    tls: z.boolean().optional(),
55	    nick: z.string().optional(),
56	    username: z.string().optional(),
57	    realname: z.string().optional(),
58	    password: z.string().optional(),
59	    passwordFile: z.string().optional(),
60	    nickserv: IrcNickServSchema.optional(),
61	    dmPolicy: DmPolicySchema.optional().default("pairing"),
62	    allowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
63	    groupPolicy: GroupPolicySchema.optional().default("allowlist"),
64	    groupAllowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
65	    groups: z.record(z.string(), IrcGroupSchema.optional()).optional(),
66	    channels: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
67	    mentionPatterns: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
68	    markdown: MarkdownConfigSchema,
69	    ...ReplyRuntimeConfigSchemaShape,
70	  })
71	  .strict();
72	
73	export const IrcAccountSchema = IrcAccountSchemaBase.superRefine((value, ctx) => {
74	  requireOpenAllowFrom({
75	    policy: value.dmPolicy,
76	    allowFrom: value.allowFrom,
77	    ctx,
78	    path: ["allowFrom"],
79	    message: 'channels.irc.dmPolicy="open" requires channels.irc.allowFrom to include "*"',
80	  });
81	});
82	
83	export const IrcConfigSchema = IrcAccountSchemaBase.extend({
84	  accounts: z.record(z.string(), IrcAccountSchema.optional()).optional(),
85	  defaultAccount: z.string().optional(),
86	}).superRefine((value, ctx) => {
87	  requireOpenAllowFrom({

90	    ctx,
91	    path: ["allowFrom"],
92	    message: 'channels.irc.dmPolicy="open" requires channels.irc.allowFrom to include "*"',
93	  });
94	});
95

All 22 files are in place. The PulseBoard channel plugin is complete. Here's a summary of everything created under `extensions/pulseboard/`:

---

## PulseBoard plugin — file summary

### Top-level (6 files)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest — id `pulseboard`, single channel |
| `package.json` | Package metadata with `openclaw` block (labels, docs path, channel id) |
| `index.ts` | Main plugin entry: `defineChannelPluginEntry` wiring `pulseBoardPlugin` + `setPulseBoardRuntime` |
| `setup-entry.ts` | Setup wizard entry: `defineSetupPluginEntry` |
| `api.ts` | Public barrel — re-exports `accounts.ts` + `setup-surface.ts` |
| `channel-config-api.ts` | Exports `PulseBoardChannelConfigSchema` for external consumers |

### `src/` (16 files)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `types.ts` | `PulseBoardAccountConfig`, `PulseBoardBoardConfig`, `CoreConfig`, `PulseBoardInboundMessage`, `PulseBoardProbe` |
| `runtime-api.ts` | Private barrel — re-exports generic channel helpers from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/irc` |
| `runtime.ts` | `getPulseBoardRuntime` / `setPulseBoardRuntime` via `createPluginRuntimeStore` |
| `accounts.ts` | `resolvePulseBoardAccount` — merges config + env vars (`PULSEBOARD_SERVER_URL`, `PULSEBOARD_API_KEY`, `PULSEBOARD_USERNAME`); handles `apiKeyFile`; multi-account support |
| `normalize.ts` | Target normalization — `board:<name>` prefix for group targets, bare username for DMs; allowlist matching |
| `policy.ts` | Board access gates, requireMention logic, sender allowlist resolution — mirrors IRC policy structure |
| `config-schema.ts` | Zod schemas: `PulseBoardBoardSchema`, `PulseBoardAccountSchema`, `PulseBoardConfigSchema`, `PulseBoardChannelConfigSchema` |
| `config-ui-hints.ts` | UI labels and help text for config fields |
| `client.ts` | Fictional HTTP client — `pollPulseBoardEvents`, `postToPulseBoardBoard`, `sendPulseBoardDm`, `fetchPulseBoardMe` using `fetch` + `X-PulseBoard-Key` auth |
| `probe.ts` | `probePulseBoard` — hits `/api/v1/me`, returns latency or error |
| `monitor.ts` | Polling loop — `monitorPulseBoardProvider` polls `/api/v1/events?since=<ms>` every `pollIntervalMs` (default 2 s); feeds `handlePulseBoardInbound` |
| `inbound.ts` | Full inbound handler — DM/group dispatch, allowlist + pairing + mention gating, `dispatchInboundReplyWithBase` |
| `send.ts` | `sendMessagePulseBoard` — routes to `postToPulseBoardBoard` or `sendPulseBoardDm` based on target type |
| `setup-core.ts` | Config patch helpers + `pulseBoardSetupAdapter` implementing `ChannelSetupAdapter` |
| `setup-surface.ts` | Full `pulseBoardSetupWizard` — env var detection, text inputs (serverUrl, apiKey, username, boards), group access, allowFrom, mention preference, completion note |
| `channel.ts` | `pulseBoardPlugin` via `createChatChannelPlugin` — capabilities `["direct","group"]`, **4000-char chunk limit**, directory, status, gateway startup, pairing, security warnings |
